name: Shopify

composio_registry_match.name: Shopify
composio_registry_match.description: Shopify is an e-commerce platform. This toolkit is GraphQL-first for new Admin API automations while retaining legacy REST compatibility actions for older workflows and numeric-ID interoperability

description: A leading e-commerce platform that enables businesses to build online stores and manage sales, inventory, and checkout.
notes: Shopify provides free Partner accounts which allow unlimited creation of development stores for building and testing apps. It features robust REST and GraphQL APIs.
